name: Mike
subject: I need your help, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I just got home after a long day of campaigning, but before I make dinner (sadly, it's not a Maid-Rite), I wanted to see if you could help out our movement.
|

Thanks, -mtf

name: Kathy Landing for Congress
subject: Major Endorsement Announcement: Unified Republican Support
body:
| | | | 15 of the Lowcountry's leading Republican women endorsed my campaign. This included the President of the East Cooper Republican Club...
---
Email not displaying correctly? [View it](https://sg-mktg._vz7-ATo6MUz-94q-PhYi) in your browser.
---
---
UNIFIED REPUBLICAN SUPPORT Friends, I'm writing to share some incredible news about the campaign. Earlier today, _we announced the most notable endorsements of any candidate so far this cycle._ **15 of the Lowcountry 's leading Republican women endorsed my campaign.** This included the President of the East Cooper Republican Club, a longtime former Beaufort County Councilwoman, and leadership from many of the Republican organizations across the district. In announcing their endorsements and unified support of our campaign, they were clear: _**I am the strongest Republican candidate to defeat Joe Cunningham this fall and win back this Congressional seat for conservatives, families and sensible solutions.**_ You can read the full announcement release [by clicking here](https://u10736622.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=yaQ-2B1mEAntSTvTJCNg0jXfBR-2Fkm9H6JbKmPeggHkmk6ao1WPhD814GEqqP4vYoVkJQPory5lOIlawXMTCemd49yO3Pdapu4XUpOM7DhB49g-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJzrEhktGbPSJxHw6QguE5FY7muS8EobeS6dNVd0BJjbK9lfEH3uPqyJ57jrgX0vjZooHOw8FAvqDcJDAesWIoCiri5RHVrLSe8eH-2Fuq3mdEcKVaQi7JVnh4dh7lmPeQgPmDirjW8iP80dHg3rxD3-2FriJ2kk-2BLRtK9-2BbVTG8c5-2FNMYMv-2BWnx6oRbZl7C9BU9juxi5ouoQCZKemzihGktk0V8V3qh9Lx1vnm-2BJLaucUJRQrN9XaC9BbFnTZlknbx0dVnJzKL8jhO3wbRI1HRFnHaayOdPhm-2BvtyUwVsogdnnVSXCdYlmAaFEPzFGABBSYH3ls0v9Hm-2F31J-2BufCgOSUiRgXEgFZ4a9F7srJCGYDmG-2BtNDeYffdaPSugLAJtizdNTNru3fLJl7Q2SAbpHn6z0GVXAfWvqa2Y4jBud1dnS4zEtNIS2ZeyBi3HMzTH0EoIRv). I'm thankful for the public support of: **Joanne Jones** , East Cooper Republican Club President **Hon. Beth Grace** , former Beaufort County Councilwoman **JoAnne Knapp** , S.C Federation of Republican Women 1st District Director **Nancy Leet** , Greater Lowcountry Republican Club Secretary **Pat Ryan** , Charleston County Republican Women Treasurer **Emily Rudolph** , Sea Island Republican Women's Club Past President **Patsy Bailey** , Sea Island Republican Women's Club Membership Chair **Charm Altman** , former S.C. Federation of Republican Women President **Brooke Hallman** , former First Lady of Mount Pleasant **Janet Zimmer** , South Carolina Republican convention state delegate **Sherri Timmerman** , Charleston County Republican Precinct President **Barbara Spell** , Charleston County Republican leader **Anna Ebeling** , Charleston County Republican leader **Ruth Lusk** , Berkeley County Republican leader **Terri Hallman Chapman** , Berkeley County Republican leader _I would be humbled and honored to earn your support and vote in the Republican Primary on June 9th. _ I encourage you to visit my website today and get involved in our efforts to win back South Carolina's First Congressional District. Thanks in advance! On to Victory,
---
---
| Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress
---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Can we talk about tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’re dangerously below our goal and I need you to rush a contribution right now.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6758%2E377263%2EIsEEad) Yang Gang --

It’s late, so I will make this quick. We are just hours away from the most important FEC filing this campaign has had thus far.

At this rate, I don’t think we are going to hit it -- not without your help. I love this team, and I know I can count on you.

**[I need you to rush a contribution of $10 or more right now so we don’t fall short on our goal. Can you do that for me?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24220?t=5&akid=6758%2E377263%2EIsEEad)**

Let’s do this, Yang Gang!

-Andrew | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24220?t=6&akid=6758%2E377263%2EIsEEad)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6758%2E377263%2EIsEEad) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6758%2E377263%2EIsEEad) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: Ann Felton (Team Neese)
subject: FWD: Kendra Horn is the Problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Have you had a chance to look at Terry's email yet? In a matter of hours, we'll reach our first fundraising deadline of 2020. If we're going to defeat Kendra Horn and the D.C. elites in November, we need you to help by taking action in the next few hours. **I just checked, and we still need 31 donors to chip in $10 or more before midnight to reach our goals this month. Can we count on you, friend?** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/v892raGaeVD6bjSdM6uJNz7Q/Auzvx7EFka9kaKeHd04fAA) [**We only have a matter of hours until the clock strikes midnight. Will you help us crush our January target by donating $10, $20, or even more before that time?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/v892raGaeVD6bjSdM6uJNz7Q/Auzvx7EFka9kaKeHd04fAA) Your support has meant so much to Terry in the past, and she's hoping we can count on you again today. Thank you, Ann **From** : Terry Neese
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date** : January 31, 2020
**Subject** : Kendra Horn is the Problem Friend, As the Senate continues their pointless impeachment trial this week, let's not forget how we got into this mess. **Just a month ago, Kendra Horn had an opportunity to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and vote no against this impeachment sham. Instead, she betrayed the people of Oklahoma by voting in line with her fellow Democrats.** We can't afford to have a representative in Congress be too afraid to do what's right and push back against a plot to remove President Trump from office. We elected President Trump in 2016 to fight for us and our values in Washington D.C.******It 's time we returned the favor by taking back the House of Representatives this fall and replacing Kendra Horn with a leader who will serve Oklahoma. ** I'm running for Congress because I can't stand idly by while Nancy Pelosi, Kendra Horn, and the Democrats get away with the most shameful witch hunt our country has ever seen. **I know we can win if we start this year full of energy and motivation to Keep America Great.[Will you join me and chip in $25 today?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/aGv4uQc9k8uGLrrynLIY4A/Auzvx7EFka9kaKeHd04fAA)** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/aGv4uQc9k8uGLrrynLIY4A/Auzvx7EFka9kaKeHd04fAA) [**Tonight at midnight, we approach our first fundraising deadline of the calendar year. Can we count on you to chip in $25 or more right now?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/aGv4uQc9k8uGLrrynLIY4A/Auzvx7EFka9kaKeHd04fAA) Kendra Horn knows we're on to her schemes to transform our country and she will do whatever she can to stop us from succeeding. But I know together, she doesn't have a shot at beating us. Terry Neese
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/QMUqn7632GG6HMuP9KUwvGHQ/Auzvx7EFka9kaKeHd04fAA) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/VfjSuH4pAP0WY1TQtY892xYg/Auzvx7EFka9kaKeHd04fAA)

name: Barack Obama Update
subject: Fwd: Obama’s asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
Team, we wish we didn't have to reach out again, but right now we still need to raise $8,313 before our critical end-of-month deadline, and we're getting really worried about closing the gap.
---
President Obama is calling on grassroots supporters to do whatever it takes to elect Democrats in key swing states this year. But with the GOP pouring MILLIONS into defeating us, we will LOSE if we don't fight back right now.
Team - we need you to answer Obama's call and take advantage of this critical match opportunity before midnight, and it looks like you still haven't given yet. **[So please, will you stand with President Obama RIGHT NOW and donate $1 or more? Every dollar will be DOUBLED to stop Republicans, elect Democrats across the country and DEFEAT TRUMP!](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY5MDE0NDES1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDAwOTQxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Obama Update** <info@dga.net>
Date: Fri, Jan 31, 2020
Subject: Obama's asking you
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
| | |
---
We were starting to lose hope, Team.

Republicans were spending MILLIONS to attack Democrats and advance the Trump agenda, **but Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. **

But then President Obama asked you to make a commitment to electing Democrats... and donations went THROUGH THE ROOF!
[](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTY5MDE0NDES1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDAwOTQxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
There are critical governors' races coming up, and we have the historic opportunity to win in states across the country. But with the GOP massively outspending us, Democrats will lose if we don't act RIGHT NOW. **Team, we need you to answer Obama 's call and donate to elect Democrats this year.******
**
We pulled your supporter record, and here 's what we found:**
**Name:** Top Supporter
**Supporter ID:** 8751682
**Given to stop Trump today?** **NO**
Hitting every single fundraising goal is the _ONLY_ way we can beat Trump and his GOP allies - but right now, we're falling way short of our $50,000 end-of-month goal, and we're running out of time.**Luckily, a group of donors is MATCHING every gift 2X to help us raise another $18,712 before midnight.**
**[Team, we need you to stand with Obama and donate $1 or more right now. Every dollar will be DOUBLED to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, defeat Republicans and STOP Trump:](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MTY5MDE0NDES1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDAwOTQxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
__ | | | [Donate $1](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MTY5MDE0NDES1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDAwOTQxMQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

clean_body: Team, we wish we didn't have to reach out again, but right now we still need to raise $8,313 before our critical end-of-month deadline, and we're getting really worried about closing the gap. President Obama is calling on grassroots supporters to do whatever it takes to elect Democrats in key swing states this year. But with the GOP pouring MILLIONS into defeating us, we will LOSE if we don't fight back right now. Team - we need you to answer Obama's call and take advantage of this critical match opportunity before midnight, and it looks like you still haven't given yet. \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Obama Update <info@dga.net> Date: Fri, Jan 31, 2020 Subject: Obama's asking you To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | We were starting to lose hope, Team. Republicans were spending MILLIONS to attack Democrats and advance the Trump agenda, but Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. But then President Obama asked you to make a commitment to electing Democrats... and donations went THROUGH THE ROOF! There are critical governors' races coming up, and we have the historic opportunity to win in states across the country. But with the GOP massively outspending us, Democrats will lose if we don't act RIGHT NOW. Team, we need you to answer Obama 's call and donate to elect Democrats this year.** We pulled your supporter record, and here 's what we found: Name: Top Supporter Supporter ID: 8751682 Given to stop Trump today? NO Hitting every single fundraising goal is the ONLY way we can beat Trump and his GOP allies - but right now, we're falling way short of our $50,000 end-of-month goal, and we're running out of time.Luckily, a group of donors is MATCHING every gift 2X to help us raise another $18,712 before midnight. ** __ | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:

| | I can hardly believe my eyes. Just this morning -- I told you I was in danger of missing my very first end-of-month goal of the year. [**But since generous donors unlocked the match -- you've come to my defense in a historic way!**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200131_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") [_**I now only need 1 more gift from 18326 before midnight to MEET tonight's critical goal, WIN this Senate race, and DEFEAT McConnell's Senate. It would mean so much to me if you were the one to push me over the top. (Your generous gift will be matched for these final 4 hours) >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200131_em_fr_b3_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I mean this with absolute certainty: This election is our once-in-a-lifetime shot to unseat Mitch McConnell's Senate. I'm humbly asking one last time before the crucial first deadline of the year hits. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f8/18e32a7f/515dc82c/7b224d70/651443360/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f8/18e32a7f/515dc82c/7b224d71/651443360/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6f8/18e32a7f/515dc82c/7b224d76/651443360/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Bloomberg?=
subject: Let's fix prescription drug prices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
We can't let Donald Trump keep lying here. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=e9355350ec&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | Rising prescription drug prices are forcing too many families to choose between getting the care they need and going into debt. That's not right -- and we have to act. Donald Trump told us: "We're gonna get drug prices so far lower than they are now, your head will spin." But what has he done to take on the problem? Nothing. The fact is: Drug prices jumped 10% in the first six months of 2019 alone. For every drug that dropped in price, 96 drugs became more expensive. And Donald Trump continues to bow down to the pharmaceutical lobby. I've never taken a penny from big drug companies -- or anyone else. And I've got a plan to deliver better health care for all Americans -- _at lower prices that everyone can afford._ We will eliminate loopholes that allow big drug companies to abuse the system, reform the Medicare Prescription Drug Benefit to encourage greater competition, and cap annual out-of-pocket costs for seniors. Each of these measures will bring costs down. **We must bring down the cost of care.**[**Tell us why you support Mike on gun safety, climate change, or health care today and you'll be entered to win a trip to Miami!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=4756185848&e=f54746ec54)
---

---
| We can't afford any more broken promises -- not while Americans across our country struggle to get care they need at prices they can afford. With your support, I will get this done. Mike Bloomberg

After checking in with my finance team, it looks like we're still falling short of our fundraising goal.

So I need to ask again, will you pitch in to help my campaign? Any amount you can donate will help us raise another $45,000.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP rushing to shut down the trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter: Even with breaking news coming out today about John Bolton's involvement in Trump's abuses of power, Mitch McConnell is getting his way: The GOP is voting against calling new witnesses. The GOP is rushing to exonerate Trump. And then they'll stop talking about it in the hopes that Americans forget that the GOP treated the Constitution like toilet paper. We're mad as hell about this, and we know you are too. We need every Democrat to get on board and be ready to defeat Trump. We have nine months to counter the lies, threats, bullying, xenophobia, sexism, and racism that Trump will spew \-- along with Mitch McConnell's finely tuned voter suppression \-- and that means we don't have any time to lose. We need to know RIGHT NOW: **Are you ready to vote Trump out of office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde76/6e9863e8/84656fe/1db067e9/1254933025/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/owiUrJEi") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde76/6e9863e8/84656fe/1db067e9/1254933025/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/owiUrJEi") Thank you for your response, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde76/6e9863e8/84656fe/1db067e9/1254933025/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/owiUrJEi")

name: Booker HQ
subject: Cory's counting on you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | We have to hit this goal. Hey team, Did you have a chance to read Cory's note from earlier today? We're inching closer and closer to our $350,000 goal with each passing minute -- _**but we 're still not quite there yet.**_ It's looking like we'll need a little extra help to push over the top -- and it's going to require our best supporters to step up as Founding Donors and contribute before tonight's 11:59 p.m. deadline. **Here 's a link to chip in now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_BHQ_20200131-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks in advance for pitching in. Cory's counting on you. Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, I know we've written to you a few times about our $350,000 fundraising goal. Let me tell you a little bit about why this particular goal is so important. When I made the difficult decision to end my campaign for president, I knew we'd be entering my Senate re-election bid behind where we'd have liked to be at this point. In fact, there are already five Republicans running against me. Many people like to say that New Jersey is a blue state, but we can't afford to take anything for granted. I want to ramp up this campaign as quickly as possible so we can win -- and win big -- this November. **To do that, we 'll need more resources -- and that's where our $350,000 goal comes in. Our deadline is 11:59 p.m. tonight and we're only a few thousand dollars short. Please chip in as one of our Founding Donors to help make up the difference.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_BHQ_20200131-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_BHQ_20200131-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_express10&amount=10&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_BHQ_20200131-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_express22&amount=22&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_BHQ_20200131-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_express100&amount=100&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_BHQ_20200131-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

We're planning to use these funds to bring on more staff, launch our first digital ads, and build the type of campaign that we can all be proud of.
If we can reach this goal, it'll also send a huge message to Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and each of my challengers that we're not taking this campaign lightly -- and that we have the strong grassroots support to ensure victory.
**[It would be a huge setback if we fell short of such an important goal just as we're getting this campaign off the ground. If you can send in a donation before tonight's deadline at 11:59 p.m., please do so here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_BHQ_20200131-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I'm hoping I'll be able to write to you tomorrow morning with some good news.
Cory

If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb0/5fca0d19/7afbc2c8/291d32ee/1011603314/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb0/5fca0d19/7afbc2c8/291d32ed/1011603314/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb0/5fca0d19/7afbc2c8/291d32ec/1011603314/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").

clean_body: | | We have to hit this goal. Hey team, Did you have a chance to read Cory's note from earlier today? We're inching closer and closer to our $350,000 goal with each passing minute -- but we 're still not quite there yet. It's looking like we'll need a little extra help to push over the top -- and it's going to require our best supporters to step up as Founding Donors and contribute before tonight's 11:59 p.m. deadline. Here 's a link to chip in now: "=" Thanks in advance for pitching in. Cory's counting on you. Booker HQ \---FORWARDED MESSAGE--- Team, I know we've written to you a few times about our $350,000 fundraising goal. Let me tell you a little bit about why this particular goal is so important. When I made the difficult decision to end my campaign for president, I knew we'd be entering my Senate re-election bid behind where we'd have liked to be at this point. In fact, there are already five Republicans running against me. Many people like to say that New Jersey is a blue state, but we can't afford to take anything for granted. I want to ramp up this campaign as quickly as possible so we can win -- and win big -- this November. To do that, we 'll need more resources -- and that's where our $350,000 goal comes in. Our deadline is 11:59 p.m. tonight and we're only a few thousand dollars short. Please chip in as one of our Founding Donors to help make up the difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" We're planning to use these funds to bring on more staff, launch our first digital ads, and build the type of campaign that we can all be proud of. If we can reach this goal, it'll also send a huge message to Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and each of my challengers that we're not taking this campaign lightly -- and that we have the strong grassroots support to ensure victory. "=" I'm hoping I'll be able to write to you tomorrow morning with some good news. Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate. This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on "", "", and "". We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "".

name: [1] Senate Battleground Fund
subject: Graham's gotta go 🤡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| **FIRST:** "If you could show me that Trump actually was engaging in a quid pro quo, outside the phone call, that would be very disturbing." -- Lindsey Graham, October 2019

**THEN:** _**Quid pro quo revealed...repeatedly**_

**NOW:** "The best thing for the American people is to end this crap as quickly as possible, to have a trial in the Senate, bipartisan acquittal of the president." -- Lindsey Graham, January 2020

[Can you chip in $10 to help defeat Trump's biggest yes-man?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb40ce/4bd7760e/4756e593/77acaa05/3844772344/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiMTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=10&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+chip+in+ask+to+help+defeat+Trump&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_180OP_200131_1_4&source=314_EM_FR_180OP_200131_1_4&refcode=314_EM_FR_180OP_200131_1_4") | | _[Donate $10 now](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb40ce/4bd7760e/4756e593/77acaa04/3844772344/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiIiwiZTN0aGMydDlmUT09IjoiMTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-2020flipthesenate?firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=10&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_180OP_200131_1_4&source=314_EM_FR_180OP_200131_1_4&refcode=314_EM_FR_180OP_200131_1_4")_
---
* * *
It's never been clearer: Lindsey Graham is Donald Trump's lapdog. He isn't interested in getting to the bottom of what happened in the Ukrainian quid pro quo. His number one job is protecting Trump and unaccountable special interests.

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE DATE: January 31, 2020 CONTACT: Mike Berg PHONE: (614) 678-1909 EMAIL: [mike@clairechase.org](mailto:mike@clairechase.org)
---
| Chase Dominates GOP Fundraising for 2nd Straight Quarter Beats Out Prior Nominee and GOP Establishment Candidate for 2nd Straight Time, by Nearly 40%

ROSWELL, NM - Conservative outsider Claire Chase, Republican candidate for New Mexico's second district, out-raised her primary opponents for the second straight quarter since joining the race. Claire Chase's Campaign Manager Mike Berg said, "We are honored by the outpouring of support from across New Mexico for Claire's candidacy. It should surprise no one that New Mexicans are showing a clear preference for a conservative political outsider like Claire over a failed career politician like Yvette Herrell."
Topline Stats On Claire Chase's Fundraising:

* Chase raised $268,717.42 during the final quarter of 2019.
* Chase has raised over three quarters of a million dollars ($779,507.42) since entering the race at the end of August.
* Chase has over half a million dollars ($588,519.40) in cash on hand.
* The majority (60%) of Chase's contributions came from New Mexico.

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: February is an extremely significant month, let’s talk about why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
A note on this important month
Peter,
February is a time to celebrate the incredible impact and accomplishments of black Americans.
America has a complicated and painful relationship with race. Our history is marred by slavery, Jim Crow, and the lingering effects of institutional racism. This month is a time for us to reflect on the vital contributions black Americans made to our nation’s history and their role in shaping our democracy into a more perfect union.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14534045/152418171/-1975513732?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjg5Mjc3YS0xODQ1LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LnKIX5T-yOHDYtEBd5SNNTmZbgtJFBBf7PFfrLsOiE=&emci=45ff7dad-1145-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a689277a-1845-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8311474)
But it’s not enough to post on social media and send an email once a year about black history - we have to fight for black Americans too, because our current system doesn’t do enough.
Dan Crenshaw? He can pay lip service to minority communities all he wants, but we see his actions. He takes away healthcare, promotes gun violence, and works against our public schools.
An elected official for the people fights for ALL people in their district, not just those who look like them. And that’s what I will do as the first Congresswoman from Texas’s 2nd District.
**[This February, consider a visit to the Houston Museum of African American Culture >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14534046/152418172/-1975513732?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjg5Mjc3YS0xODQ1LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LnKIX5T-yOHDYtEBd5SNNTmZbgtJFBBf7PFfrLsOiE=&emci=45ff7dad-1145-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a689277a-1845-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8311474)**
With gratitude,
Elisa Cardnell

_Do you follow us on[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14534047/152418173/-166923459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjg5Mjc3YS0xODQ1LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LnKIX5T-yOHDYtEBd5SNNTmZbgtJFBBf7PFfrLsOiE=&emci=45ff7dad-1145-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a689277a-1845-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8311474) and [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14534048/152418174/-1890024002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjg5Mjc3YS0xODQ1LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LnKIX5T-yOHDYtEBd5SNNTmZbgtJFBBf7PFfrLsOiE=&emci=45ff7dad-1145-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a689277a-1845-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8311474)? Last week, we received our three millionth donation, and before we closed the books on January's FEC deadline last night, we hit another huge milestone: one million individual donors have donated... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a3c7/45c30650/1e5a094df/66e316cb/3382074162/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Thank you, thank you, thank you.

Thank you for being a part of this grassroots team, being in this fight, and investing in the big, structural change we need.

Last week, we received our three millionth donation, and before we closed the books on January's FEC deadline last night, we hit another huge milestone: **one million individual donors have donated to this grassroots movement.

This is a powerful moment for our campaign.**

We reached one million donors because of people like Beth in Kentucky, who pitched in last February because she wants to make sure we provide a safety net for people who've become homeless after losing jobs or are facing health care costs they can't cover.

We reached one million donors because of people like Karylinda in Michigan -- who donated while she was on strike at GM because she wants a president who stands up for people like her.

We reached one million donors because of people like Zachary, who can't afford to give much but chipped in $3 because our campaign gave him something to believe in.

And we reached one million donors without taking a single cent from Washington lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

**In just two days, the Iowa caucuses will be underway. It will be another big moment for our campaign. And with you on this team, I know that we're ready to win.**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

P.S. Out of our 1,000,000 donors, one out of every ten currently have a weekly or monthly recurring donation. **[If you're in this all the way, join those donors today with a recurring donation of your own.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a3c7/45c30650/1e5a094df/66e316cf/3382074162/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8wMUZfVFlFX1RZRV9FXzIwMjAwMjAxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO01F_TYE_TYE_E_20200201_V1S1_P&recurring=true")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 5 Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
President Trump signed the historic USMCA this week, replacing the disastrous Clinton-era NAFTA. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2210851ba4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | **[Trump Signs USMCA, Paving Way for Job Market Boom](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e88d1fddb&e=3ee4985eea)**
-Fox Business
“President Trump signed the historic United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement, replacing the Clinton-era North American Free Trade Agreement that he called a ‘disaster.’ The USMCA, which is the biggest trade deal of all-time, covers more than $1.3 trillion of commerce,” Jonathan Garber reports.

**In photos:**[President Trump keeps his promise to replace NAFTA](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b5f0696a61&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Crying Wolf on Impeachment](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5c39e681b&e=3ee4985eea)**
_-The Wall Street Journal_
“The impeachment trial of Donald J. Trump is coming down to one big question: Will Democrats, by crying wolf, drown out the more legitimate Republican cry of foul?” Kimberly Strassel writes. “Democrats broke every standard of due process, transparency and fairness in their House investigation, making a mockery of their constitutional duty.”

**🎬** **Watch:**[House Dems called 17 witnesses. Their case failed, so they want more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ba85edd7c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Jared Kushner: A Pivotal Moment in the Middle East](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=073b16ade9&e=3ee4985eea)**
-CNN
“After joining the administration, one of the first assignments I was given by President Trump was to develop a plan to resolve the decades-old Israel-Palestinian conflict. I am pleased to say that, after three years of work, we have made a breakthrough. Our vision for peace is by far the most comprehensive and realistic plan that has ever been released,” Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner writes.
---
|
---
| **[Ivanka Trump Confirms $42M Budget Increase to Support Human Trafficking Victims](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d754b91d67&e=3ee4985eea)**
-Fox Business
President Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, Attorney General William Barr, and Adviser to the President Ivanka Trump discussed ways to combat human trafficking at a White House Summit yesterday. “The first daughter confirmed a Wednesday report during the summit that President Trump will soon be proposing a $42 million budget increase for 2021 to support victims and efforts to prosecute criminals who take part in human trafficking,” Audrey Conklin reports.

**President Trump:** [We are 100% committed to ending human trafficking.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=761c9f074f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[USMCA Paves the Way for Productivity and Prosperity](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d36b753273&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_Des Moines Register_
“Skeptics of President Donald Trump’s bold way of negotiating trade ate a bit of crow this month. That includes this Iowa senator. I’m not a big fan of tariffs. So, when the president imposed tariffs as leverage in world trade talks, I was skeptical. [Yet] President Trump has succeeded in securing two major trade agreements that are good for America and good for Iowa,” Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06b9ef751c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d6d96bc1c8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0f42731e71)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom=20for=20Senate?=
subject: BREAKING: Lindstrom Outraises Kobach, Wagle
body:
Kobach, Wagle drop in polls | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/breaking-lindstrom-outraises-kobach-wagle?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| **For Immediate Release **
**February 1, 2020 **
**BREAKING: LINDSTROM OUTRAISES KOBACH AND WAGLE**
**_Kobach and Wagle fall behind as Kansans begin evaluating the field_**
OVERLAND PARK – Dave Lindstrom announced today raising $119,250 in the fourth quarter of 2019 in his campaign for the Republican nomination for the U.S. Senate. Wagle reported $103,000 and Kobach $102,000. Kobach also reported spending far more than he raised during the quarter.

While newly filed 2019 fourth quarter fundraising reports show struggling fundraising for their campaigns, recent polling also shows a steep erosion of support for Wagle and Kobach in the electorate. Comparing public polling data from the NRSC and PACs supporting both Kobach and Marshall, Wagle’s support has dropped 25% across polls publicly released to date. Kobach’s support dropped a staggering 35%. Two consecutive polls now show Wagle firmly in fourth place with the electorate.

While Congressman Roger Marshall reaps the financial rewards of his relationships with Washington special interests and establishment leadership, polling done by a Marshall affiliated PAC following his campaign’s television ad blitz shows that despite this “flash of cash” effort, his support with Kansas voters is barely changed from earlier polling. Kansans are clearly rejecting Washington’s attempt to buy this race.

“Kansans are done with the tired menu of politicians offered up by the political establishment,” said Dave Lindstrom. “I am grateful and encouraged by the support of my Kansas neighbors for our campaign to keep our U.S. Senate seat working for Kansans – not Washington or Topeka lobbyists.”

Reviewing the same public polling, support for Lindstrom’s campaign has doubled across the recent publicly released polls. Lindstrom is a Johnson County businessman new to the statewide political stage. As the campaign unfolds and voters take notice of Lindstrom’s candidacy and business background, voters are gravitating away from the known politicians in the race and supporting Lindstrom’s effort.

“We’re more than six months away from Election Day, and with nearly one third of the electorate uncommitted, the momentum for our campaign will continue its march forward toward overtaking the established politicians in this race,” said Lindstrom. “Together, we, as Kansans, are overcoming Washington’s deliberate and constant interference in this election.”
**KEEP OUR MOMENTUM GOING
DONATE TODAY**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: No matter how this ends, the Democrats have won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Source: [@SpeakerPelosi](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4a/6e9863e8/843c6e1/1db067f2/1288806572/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://twitter.com/SpeakerPelosi/status/1217603802892840965") House Speaker Nancy Pelosi firmly held on to the articles of impeachment until more evidence for removing Trump from office came forward. Since then, John Bolton _VOLUNTEERED_ to testify, Lev Parnas provided tomes of evidence further implicating Trump, the Government Accountability Office released a report stating the Trump administration _DID_ commit a crime in withholding the aid to Ukraine, and Mitch McConnell's control of his GOP caucus has finally begun to crumble. No matter how this ends, the GOP cannot deny that Trump committed crimes and that they made every attempt to cover it up. Nancy Pelosi has shown America the raw truth of Trump's Republican Party, and voters are paying attention ahead of November 2020. Nancy Pelosi has continuously rallied Democrats together and fended off GOP attacks with grace and dignity. But she can't be the only one fighting. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into the next election. We need to hear from you today: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4a/6e9863e8/843c6e1/1db067f1/1288806572/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/NcjgDnq5") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4a/6e9863e8/843c6e1/1db067f1/1288806572/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/NcjgDnq5") Thank you, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4a/6e9863e8/843c6e1/1db067f1/1288806572/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/NcjgDnq5")

name: Yang2020 HQ
subject: Urgent: DNC just changed the debate stage rules
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk) **BREAKING:

The DNC debate threshold just changed to accommodate billionaires.

[Help us respond.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=5&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=7&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)
---
Yang Gang --

The DNC announced they have upended the debate qualifications that have governed the debate stage process for this entire election.

They’ve removed the grassroots donor threshold -- you know, the one that requires that a candidate has real grassroots support before getting on a debate stage.

**Know who is most excited about this? Billionaires who are buying their way into this race.

[They just made it a whole lot easier for billionaires -- and a whole lot harder for Andrew. Can you help us respond by rushing a donation of any size right now?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=8&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=14&amount=25&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)
---
We knew that this would be hard. We even knew that the establishment would help the establishment candidates. But we didn’t know they were going to bend over backwards to help the billionaires.

Thank you for whatever you can give right now,

Yang2020 HQ
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24245?t=6&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6771%2E377263%2E-sM_Hk) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

* Michael Bennet is the best candidate to beat Donald Trump
* Our momentum is building on the ground and in polls
* [But right now, we're being wildly outraised and outspent](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab33/134673f2/379454db/69972a1a/3537800830/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

|

Urgent, Peter --

**The voter registration deadline for the Texas primary is just TWO DAYS AWAY, and early voting begins in TWO WEEKS.** With those critical deadlines approaching, **I 'm getting ready to show MJ a list of our recent donors.**

**But before I do, I wanted to give you a chance to make sure YOUR name is on it! Will you make your first* donation now and get your name on our list of grassroots donors when I show it to MJ tomorrow?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890462/7f51f7bc/4d6c64b2/4ef05316/1837704033/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-earlyvoting2wksnd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200201.1nd__850__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890462/7f51f7bc/4d6c64b2/4ef0530b/1837704033/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-earlyvoting2wksnd?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200201.1nd__850__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890462/7f51f7bc/4d6c64b2/4ef0530a/1837704033/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-earlyvoting2wksnd?refcode=email_20200201.1nd__850__")**

We're proud to already have **over 29,000 grassroots donors** and counting, with an **average contribution of just $22** and a whopping **$0 from corporate PACs!**

Cornyn!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890462/7f51f7bc/4d6c64b2/4ef05317/1837704033/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-earlyvoting2wksnd?refcode=email_20200201.1nd__850__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Taylor Klos, TX Finance Director

body:

| | Senate Republicans had the chance to do the right thing, but they chose party loyalty over patriotism. They all deserve to be VOTED OUT. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d05a9/72412298/4ee07666/61045bb8/3619551339/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9mZWIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDIwMV9TZW5CYXR0bGVncm91bmRfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyNSJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_feb?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200201_SenBattleground_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200201_SenBattleground_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200201_SenBattleground_U1_X1") A trial without witnesses and documents is a cover-up. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Teed-up for acquittal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
The lying Democrats tried to destroy President Trump with the bogus Russian collusion claim | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ddc557108fa3/come-and-take-it-dems-556165?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi ,

The lying Democrats tried to destroy President Trump with the bogus Russian collusion claim.

That didn’t work.

They tried to un-elect him with their impeachment sham.

**AND THIS ISN’T WORKING EITHER!**

Just yesterday, the United States Senators rejected a motion to call new witnesses in President Trump’s impeachment trial.

Because of yesterday’s vote, the Senate could **_ACQUIT THE PRESIDENT AS EARLY AS NEXT WEEK!_**

Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and all the other swamp creatures who want to ruin America, will NOT win the day! Their witch-hunt approach to un-electing the man **YOU elected** as our President has been a stain on our nation’s history.

>From creating millions of jobs, to protecting our national security, to defending the innocent unborn, President Trump is what our country needed in 2016.

**And he is what our country needs in 2020 – along with a REPUBLICAN House of Representatives!**

You and I **must** win back the House of Representatives if we are going to help President Trump continue **KEEPING AMERICA GREAT**!

I’m working long days and long nights to get to Washington D.C. as your next Congressman to help flip the House of Representatives in order to help President Trump pass his entire agenda.

Will **YOU** stand with me and President Trump in our fight to defeat the socialist Democrats?

---
|
---
| [YES! I want to defeat the Democrats!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=22baee2a0d&e=01c99b7fbd "YES! I want to defeat the Democrats!")
---
| You and I will not give up until we preserve our conservative values in Washington D.C. for the sake of CD-22, Texas, and our country!

For liberty,
Kathaleen Wall
---
| | Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487
[Add us to your address book](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877)
You can [update your preferences](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd&c=508653e97c).
---

name: Sara 2020
subject: Senator Collins never had any intention of letting the facts get out in this trial. That's why she voted against Schumer's amendment to subpoena Mulvaney, Bolton, and White House documents.
body:
It's time to replace her in the Senate.

Last night, Susan Collins voted against an amendment to subpoena key impeachment witnesses like Mick Mulvaney and John Bolton, as well as White House, OMB, DOD and State Department documents.
It couldn't be more clear: Collins voted "Yes" on witness testimony as a cover because she is up for reelection. But she had no intention of letting the facts get out in this trial.
**[Fight back with a $3 contribution to defeat Susan Collins now.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802904/4bef7a87/6d6f13bc/287fb36e/3716703958/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200201-1-full")**
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802904/4bef7a87/6d6f13bc/287fb36e/3716703958/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200201-1-full")**********
Susan Collins will only vote against her party when it won't make a difference to the outcome. She puts Mitch McConnell before Maine when it matters. That's why it's time to replace her in the Senate.
\- Team Sara

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Election Watch
body:
| | Keeping Christian voters informed on important election developments!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUovpm6NPEB9Jr0oU3g0h156wDgw27c8RSRYMTf0t9ziY&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200201com01&n=1)
| Peter, We know it’s going to be very busy between now and November. To break down the news and activity of the elections, we’re launching the Election Watch. Welcome to our first edition. We’ll do the research, stay up to date on important election developments, and provide you with the information to help keep you current on the latest developments. **Election Watch** After a very long run-up, the first votes of the Democratic primary season will finally be cast in just a couple of short days. The field which once had over 20 candidates has already winnowed to a handful, as polling numbers and donations, ran low. Still standing are the three front-runners (Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren), one dark horse (Indiana mayor Pete Buttigieg), and a couple of long shots (MN Senator Amy Klobuchar and businessman/NY Mayor Michael Bloomberg). With the stakes so high, things have turned personal in the past couple of weeks. Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren have largely been courting the same block of voters. Bernie, of course, is an open socialist and would transform nearly everything about the structure and economics of the country if given the chance. Elizabeth Warren agrees with him on almost every issue of significance but doesn’t use the label “socialist” for herself. Her views are no secret though, and Democrats on the most progressive wing of the party are mostly choosing between the two candidates. Joe Biden is viewed as less radical than Sanders and Warren, but he no longer seems to be as moderate as he was in the 1990s, a reflection of the Democratic party as a whole. As an example, in a major disappointment to pro-lifers in the party, he joined all the other candidates and abandoned his support of the Hyde Amendment this past summer. [continue reading...](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUcu6DrANLDkODcRAqb8Z-yiZKkOoJXFK1B_31xod_YPA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200201com01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ieBy60TvLGnOIGi3DxU1rjlS2gfivznXOo2VQj2oHvWUcu6DrANLDkODcRAqb8Z-yiZKkOoJXFK1B_31xod_YPA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200201com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200201com01&n=4)

name: Peter Khalil
subject: The end of one journey...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil
body:
| | | | ...is the beginning of another.
---
---
**—**
I said when I announced my run for Congress last year that I would end this campaign as I began it: with gratitude.
After nearly a year of campaigning, dozens of events, hundreds of personal moments, and thousands of miles traveled, I have decided to end my bid for Washington’s 3rd Congressional District seat.
My decision is based on a number of factors: the resources required to continue a viable effort through the primary, an analysis of the support available for a progressive candidate in this district, as well as the impact of campaigning on my family.
Washington’s 3rd District is a unique beast. It is one of the largest Congressional districts in the nation. It is both rural and urban. As a purple district, it is rife with both inter- and intra-party division.
My travels through the district, as well as my efforts to raise sufficient financial resources to sustain this campaign have led me to the conclusion that we currently lack a sufficiently robust progressive movement – including the money, infrastructure, and human capital – for any progressive to have a path to victory in 2020.
I began this race as an FDR Democrat, dedicated to the timeless notion that respect for our institutions and love for our fellow Americans could transcend party divisions. Many of you agreed with me and I am heartened by your support. I will be forever grateful to the hundreds of you who demonstrated your faith in my candidacy through your donations, your tireless volunteerism, and your endorsements.
Rest assured that the conclusion of my campaign does not signal my withdrawal from public life. Quite the contrary: my life will remain a life of service. As part of that service, I will continue to be an advocate, a writer, an educator, and a commentator on the issues that matter most to our nation and to our community.
I look forward to staying in touch with all of you as we enter this new decade – and hopefully this new era – in the history of our republic.
With gratitude, excitement, and continued faith in our American institutions,
Peter

---
Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Arizona GOP caught committing racist voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In a completely-not-shocking appeals court decision, the 9th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals declared that Arizona Republicans' efforts to commit voter suppression was motivated by racism. According to _Slate_ , "The court invalidated a law that was plainly designed to stop Native American, Hispanic, and black voters from casting a ballot \-- not just because it happened to burden minorities more than whites, but because it is flat-out racist." This is just the latest blatant GOP attempt to disenfranchise minority communities and steal votes from people to stay in power. They've been caught doing it in Wisconsin, Georgia, Ohio, and Texas \-- all critical states for them. This is only going to get worse as Republicans work to keep Trump in office and retain control of the Senate. Yet, Trump's approval rating is holding steady around 43% \-- he is on track to win re-election. That's why we need to know if your voting plans have changed: **Do you plan to vote for Trump in 2020?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4c/6e9863e8/87cb454/1db067fb/2579832516/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/y6LjU8iX") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4c/6e9863e8/87cb454/1db067fb/2579832516/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/y6LjU8iX") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4c/6e9863e8/87cb454/1db067fb/2579832516/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/y6LjU8iX")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Caucus for Life!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/caucus-for-life?e=90fad69796)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# _**My fellow Iowans... With caucuses on Monday...**_
> I need your help in speaking on my behalf at the caucuses on February 3rd. I have been working hard all over the 2nd District to help bring conservative values to Washington D.C. In order to accomplish this unprecedented grassroots movement to take back the 2nd District from 14 long years of Democrat control, we need your support in the primary race on June 2nd! **I am the only candidate in this race that has been in U.S. Congress before with a stellar record of fighting for conservative values.** This crucial experience will allow me to make immediate change in Congress when I am elected. I am the only candidate in this race that has been endorsed repeatedly by the National Right to Life, while our primary opponent in this race has to even fill out the survey and was awarded the “Pretender Award” from the Iowa Right to Life. If you can’t be trusted on the life issue, how can you be trusted on other important issues.
>
> _**Most Importantly WE CAN WIN!**_
>>
> Included in this email is a letter I wrote that highlights my values and why I am running to fight for your values. With this in mind, please take a couple minutes at your caucus to speak on my behalf.
>
> [Letter From Bobby Schilling](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=4e3267c637&e=90fad69796)
For Iowa,

\- Bobby Schilling

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: touching base to say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
January is over and we are now four months away from the Montana primary election. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=e5760eefe8e446f0acff50009b5e3c1a&_e=TX6nSPaOVb7khUqdE_3sPnC429smNiWB0wZLhP0D-cuUHTa4o5SzULBg1A2kurNxS91pKydXDhQy47jJiXbi6gQW0wMrRPAj6rXHP03ACCTk3gBXzaTZgjFk78F-R5ZWHWplkAE7JNI0eHesKpnqyRfQjd_vSDKuB0X57loJ7A1eAaZ-mIKmZLiWA1bskBbdHYMUKmM65aQ6Z-4z2M4dBhjCcZgYXKjHsr68M3LC_UzhTkLLZuxI0v0EKEGTOiKpwX21qmXIUgqSmQkrZes-dgQl6qW9q-0Kmda-dfwrAZlNqTlk3YRrBEeA6ovy8P_L) January is over and we are now four months away from the Montana primary election. I want to thank you for all you’ve done to make the start of 2020 so successful for our campaign. I wouldn’t be here if it weren’t for people like you, and I know that with our combined people power, we can beat the culture of hate, fear and isolation driven by Trump, McConnell and their friend Senator Steve Daines. We’re picking up steam as we travel up and down the state, so make sure you’re getting the right number of email updates from my team and me as we grow this campaign from the ground up. [I want updates!](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=e5760eefe8e446f0acff50009b5e3c1a&_e=TX6nSPaOVb7khUqdE_3sPnC429smNiWB0wZLhP0D-cuUHTa4o5SzULBg1A2kurNxS91pKydXDhQy47jJiXbi6gQW0wMrRPAj6rXHP03ACCSyZH8of9jP9WLwrNeMBtySI9AybFMrSem19PN5pBepjS8MOSKrlaQBoxDe8mzOw7IkEJf502P-wG_dZS4AfArUttdfUn-MaXvzAjY7IdQIEN_OhWXfoH1D6BtkPUnCPsNfnJWADxa3PH9b3QiwlcHLRTAAm7YBu6yMLtJsFOcSLAMpuIHeoHQA9QDnEYpwErc-HsSgNIvoCNsha8LjSXwq) [Just send me the most important info](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=e5760eefe8e446f0acff50009b5e3c1a&_e=TX6nSPaOVb7khUqdE_3sPnC429smNiWB0wZLhP0D-cuUHTa4o5SzULBg1A2kurNxS91pKydXDhQy47jJiXbi6gQW0wMrRPAj6rXHP03ACCR0snZCZsGfBpViADv-F1l_EmTZ1JNDNAidYyER7-oymk-8CG2p-YdKqaYD2ZP_oNJ2j00lpCDQnX_G1w6LGaIlz-WkGagFMcHXsr1b-vyjFWPNGcLVlBSOjuP7I-nEtEwJ1J3u0750cfKtHZpXKhYDVsoh1TrR8lYwyS91_v8vtQ47VWjCxPqV9UWbBT4JlHUi1hTHMjCdVRhgDW0KaHcb) Thank you, Wilmot Collins

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Peter: Do you agree with Adam Schiff?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Adam Schiff: "If the truth doesn't matter, we're lost. "Framers couldn't protect us from ourselves, if right and truth don't matter. "And you know that what he did was not right. You know, that's what they do in the old country, that Colonel Vindman's father came from. Or the old country that my great grandfather came from, or the old countries that your ancestors came from, or maybe you came from. But here, right is supposed to matter. It's what's made us the greatest nation on earth. No constitution can protect us if right doesn't matter anymore. "And you know you can't trust this president to do what's right for this country. You can trust he will do what's right for Donald Trump. "He'll do it now. He's done it before. He'll do it for the next several months. "He'll do it in the election if he's allowed to. "This is why, if you find him guilty, you must find that he should be removed. Because right matters. Because right matters, and the truth matters. Otherwise, we are lost." **Do you agree with Adam Schiff?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4e/6e9863e8/87e3a4b/1db067ff/3476036688/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/LvGh5byK") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4e/6e9863e8/87e3a4b/1db067ff/3476036688/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/LvGh5byK") Thank you for your response, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde4e/6e9863e8/87e3a4b/1db067ff/3476036688/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/LvGh5byK")

| | Senator Cornyn just banked another $2.75 million. He's raising millions, buying ads, and hiring staff. Help MJ keep up!

[Rush a donation to the Fight Back Fund >>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890460/7f51f7bc/4d6eb8ed/4ef05353/69276342/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200201.2nd__841__&amount=10&recurring=true") Peter: Senator John Cornyn has spent his career selling everyday people out to special interests, and his latest fundraising numbers are just what you'd expect. **He now has over $12 million cash on hand,** and over two decades in Washington he's raised:
* $1.2 million from the pharmaceutical industry

* $200,000 from **the gun lobby** \-- _the 6th highest total of any senator!_

* $11 million from corporate PACs

**The dark money-fueled Koch network has also made reelecting Senator Cornyn one of their top 5 priorities in this year 's Senate elections**. Their super PAC has already spent a huge sum of money on his behalf, and there's more sure to come. **[Can MJ count on you to pitch in to our Fight Back Fund?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890460/7f51f7bc/4d6eb8ed/4ef05353/69276342/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200201.2nd__841__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

There's a reason the Koch network is so desperate to see Sen. Cornyn stay in Washington: They know that if MJ wins this race, she won't be a yes-woman for special interests. She'll be accountable to hardworking folks like you instead.

That's why we launched this Fight Back Fund -- to give MJ the resources she needs to compete with Senator Cornyn's special interest cash. **[Will you rush a donation now to help us DEFEAT Senator Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890460/7f51f7bc/4d6eb8ed/4ef05353/69276342/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200201.2nd__841__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Yang
subject: Can you take a few minutes and make some calls into Iowa?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6803%2E377263%2EJMfhli) Yang Gang --

There are just two days left until the Iowa caucus and we’re hearing that the energy on the ground is palpable. To build on that momentum, our team in Iowa just launched our official Get Out the Caucus (GOTC) program.

In the next few days, our team will knock on tens of thousands of doors to make sure all of our first time caucus-goers show up -- setting us up to shock the establishment.

**But we need your help to make sure the team on the ground knows which Iowans they should help turn out to vote.**

[We need supporters all over the country making phone calls right now into Iowa. Can you make some calls today?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23703?t=7&akid=6803%2E377263%2EJMfhli) | [Make Calls](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23703?t=8&akid=6803%2E377263%2EJMfhli)
---
Together, we've shown the world that it's possible to create a movement that is 100% driven by working people.

Now, it’s time to do everything you can to push Andrew over the finish line.

[Please join us on the Yang dialer now and through the caucus on February 3. We need your support now more than ever. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23703?t=9&akid=6803%2E377263%2EJMfhli)
[Make Calls](https://act.yang2020.com/go/23703?t=10&akid=6803%2E377263%2EJMfhli)
---
Team Yang

P.S. Can’t make calls? [Can you chip in so we can reach more voters with ads and work from our organizers on the ground?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24274?t=2&akid=6803%2E377263%2EJMfhli)
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24274?t=3&akid=6803%2E377263%2EJMfhli)

Peter,

Joe is running this campaign with the idea that we're in a battle for the soul of America. That we have an enormous opportunity to put our country back on the road to progress. And that if we give Donald Trump another four years, the consequences could last for generations to come.

We're on track to make history this year, but we have to make sure that we are executing a winning strategy at all times. And with officially one week to go until the Iowa Caucuses, our supporters' input is more valuable than ever before.

Before voting is officially underway, we'd like for you to quickly complete our latest strategy survey. The average response time is just 2 minutes, so we won't keep you long.

[Peter -- click here to get started right away »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931897f/1cd0ac28/c57e81d1/356513ee/2709353532/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/january-strategy-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.02.01_B10_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend7_X__F1_S1_C1__str&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.02.01_B10_reactivation-tier2-reactivationsend7_X__F1_S1_C1__str")

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931897f/1cd0ac28/c57e81d1/356513e8/2709353532/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931897f/1cd0ac28/c57e81d1/356513e3/2709353532/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, we couldn't be more grateful for your support. You've proven that this is truly a people-powered campaign.

Yesterday we were stunned to hear that the DNC will continue to undercut the nomination process with arbitrary rules that favor billionaires while forcing many qualified candidates out of the race.

We're in a fight for the soul of our party and our country.

[The debate stage could devolve into bickering between politically extreme candidates who don't stand a chance against Trump and billionaires who bought their spot - instead of staunch Democrats with a proven track record, who offer real policies that the majority of Americans support and the experience to get them done.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab2f/134673f2/37973417/69972b73/2755378037/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Sara 2020
subject: First, Collins voted to confirm Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. Then, she waited until she had Mitch McConnell's permission before announcing her vote for witness testimony in the impeachment trial.
body:
Fight back. Elect Sara Gideon.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802907/4bef7a87/6d626107/287fb37d/2502493076/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**First:** Susan Collins voted along party lines and cast critical votes to confirm Brett Kavanaugh and pass the GOP tax bill.
**Then:** She waited until she had Mitch McConnell's permission before announcing she would vote for witness testimony in the impeachment trial. It was all just political theater -- she waited until McConnell had secured the votes he needed to block witnesses!
**Now:** We know for sure Mitch McConnell can count on Susan Collins to do his bidding in the Senate -- and she'll only vote against her party when it won't make a difference to the outcome.
**[That's why we're asking you to make a $3 contribution to help defeat Susan Collins right now. Will you chip in at this link?](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802907/4bef7a87/6d626107/287fb37c/2502493076/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200201-2-full")**

Let's do this,
\- Team Sara

name: Warren for President
subject: If you have 2 minutes, can you take our one-question survey and tell our campaign what issues matter to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
On Monday, the Iowa caucuses will kick off the next phase of this primary. But before that happens, we wanted to check in with this team one last time and hear about what issues are on the top of... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a3fe/45c30650/1e5739bc6/66e30320/243361615/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
**[If you have 2 minutes, can you take our one-question survey and tell our campaign what issues matter to you?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a3fe/45c30650/1e5739bc6/66e30327/243361615/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8wNEZfU1VSX0lTU19QXzIwMjAwMjAxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMO04F_SUR_ISS_P_20200201_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

On Monday, the Iowa caucuses will kick off the next phase of this primary.

But before that happens, we wanted to check in with this team one last time and hear about what issues are at the top of your mind.

When you share your priorities with our campaign, you're playing a powerfully important role in our movement -- like when a teacher suggested that Elizabeth's Secretary of Education should be a former public school teacher. Elizabeth loved that idea, and soon after, we announced it as a formal pledge. (Thanks, Liat, for the suggestion!)

Hearing from grassroots supporters like you is the heart of the campaign we're building. Because we're fighting for a future where Washington doesn't just work for the wealthy and well-connected -- and where your voice is always heard.

**So before we enter the next phase of this primary, we want to know: What issues matter most to you and your family?**

But before that happens, we wanted to check in with this team one last time and hear about what issues are at the top of your mind. When you share your priorities with our campaign, you're playing a powerfully important role in our movement -- like when a teacher suggested that Elizabeth's Secretary of Education should be a former public school teacher. Hearing from grassroots supporters like you is the heart of the campaign we're building. name: Cory Booker
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | I just want to say thanks. Team, I have some news to share. **Last night, we officially reached our $350,000 fundraising goal. This means we surpassed our very first goal of this campaign.** We're off to a really great start here. I just wanted to send you a quick note to say thank you. Once I left the presidential race, I was really hoping we'd be able to start my re-election to the Senate in a strong position. And thanks to you, and to the thousands of others who invested in our campaign, we were able to do exactly that. This was certainly an ambitious goal for us to meet as we got our campaign up-and-running. Now we're going to put these resources to use by scaling up our operation in a way that puts us in the best position for victory come Election Day this November. The impeachment trial is serving as a powerful reminder of what's at stake, and how important it is for Democrats to take back the Senate. If you help send me back to the Senate for another term, I'm going to keep speaking truth to power and standing up for justice. I'm so grateful to have you on this team. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200201_CB_20200201-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb3/5fca0d19/7afe1e04/291d32d8/3771302936/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb3/5fca0d19/7afe1e04/291d3127/3771302936/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb3/5fca0d19/7afe1e04/291d3126/3771302936/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb3/5fca0d19/7afe1e04/291d3125/3771302936/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").
